svg.metadata:
# Looply 登录注册模块系统流程图 V7.0 # 研发编码参考数据，从 SVG <metadata> 提取
swimlanes: - key: "A" name: "登录注册系统" - key: "M" name: "消息通知" - key: "E" name: "外部服务"
sections: - name: "① 邮箱注册" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始注册" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收注册请求(邮箱+密码)" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱格式正确?" on_no: "返回邮箱格式错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "密码规则通过?" on_no: "返回密码规则提示" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "已勾选协议?" on_no: "返回未勾选" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "采集设备指纹+IP" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "注册限频?" on_no: "返回请求过多" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱未注册?" on_no: "返回已注册" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "风控检测通过?" on_no: "拦截/要求验证" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "请求发送验证码" - type: cross_lane from: "A" to: "M" text: "生成验证码并存储" - type: cross_lane from: "M" to: "E" text: "邮件服务商投递" - type: cross_lane from: "E" to: "A" text: "用户输入验证码" - type: cross_lane from: "A" to: "M" text: "校验验证码" - type: decision lane: "M" text: "验证码有效?" on_no: "返回错误/已过期" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: cross_lane from: "M" to: "A" text: "创建账号" - type: process lane: "A" text: "签发Token" - type: process lane: "A" text: "记录设备指纹+关联Session" - type: start_end text: "注册完成" - name: "② 邮箱登录" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始登录" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收登录请求(邮箱+密码)" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱格式正确?" on_no: "返回邮箱格式错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "采集设备指纹+IP" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "风控检测通过?(规则同①)" on_no: "拦截/要求验证" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱存在?" on_no: "返回邮箱或密码错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "密码错误>=5次?" on_no: "锁定账号30分钟" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "密码正确?" on_no: "返回邮箱或密码错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "签发Token设Cookie" - type: process lane: "A" text: "记录设备指纹+关联Session" - type: start_end text: "登录完成" - type: note title: "Identifier-First 统一入口(预留)" lines: - "当前：①② 分离式注册/登录入口" - "预留：Identifier-First 统一入口模式" - "迁移：前置 /api/auth/identify 端点" - "返回 {action: register|login, methods: [...]}" - "①② 后端流程段零改动，仅新增路由层" - name: "③ OAuth认证" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收三方登录/注册请求" - type: process lane: "A" text: "采集设备指纹+IP" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "风控检测通过?(规则同①)" on_no: "拦截/要求验证" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: cross_lane from: "A" to: "E" text: "跳转OAuth授权页" - type: process lane: "E" text: "用户授权,返回授权码" - type: cross_lane from: "E" to: "A" text: "用code换取token" - type: process lane: "A" text: "获取用户信息(uid/email/name)" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "provider_uid已绑定?" on_no: "直接签发Token完成" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: condition_branch lane: "A" text: "邮箱已注册?" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" yes_branch: - text: "关联已有账号" no_branch: - text: "创建新账号" - type: process lane: "A" text: "写入OAuth绑定记录" - type: multi_branch lane: "A" text: "Provider类型?" branches: - label: "Google" nodes: - type: process text: "email写入凭证表" - type: process text: "预填昵称" - label: "Apple" nodes: - type: condition_branch text: "给了真实邮箱?" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" yes_branch: - text: "email写入凭证表" - type: process text: "预填昵称(仅首次)" - label: "Facebook" nodes: - type: condition_branch text: "有邮箱?" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" yes_branch: - text: "email写入凭证表" no_branch: - text: "标记待补邮箱" - type: process text: "预填昵称" - type: process lane: "A" text: "签发Token" - type: process lane: "A" text: "记录设备指纹+关联Session" - type: start_end text: "认证完成" - type: note title: "已绑定用户(老用户)路径" lines: - "provider_uid已绑定 = 老用户重复OAuth登录" - "直接: 签发Token → 记录设备指纹+关联Session → 完成" - "跳过下方所有注册/绑定/Provider特殊处理步骤" - name: "④ 忘记密码" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收重置密码请求(邮箱)" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱格式正确?" on_no: "返回邮箱格式错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "邮箱存在?" on_no: "返回已发送(防枚举)" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "请求发送验证码" - type: decision lane: "M" text: "发信限频?" on_no: "返回请求过多" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: process lane: "M" text: "生成验证码并存储" - type: cross_lane from: "M" to: "E" text: "邮件服务商投递" - type: cross_lane from: "E" to: "A" text: "用户输入验证码" - type: cross_lane from: "A" to: "M" text: "校验验证码" - type: decision lane: "M" text: "验证码有效?" on_no: "返回错误/已过期" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: cross_lane from: "M" to: "A" text: "用户输入新密码(两次)" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "密码规则校验?" on_no: "返回密码规则提示" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "与旧密码相同?" on_no: "返回不能相同" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: process lane: "A" text: "更新密码哈希" - type: process lane: "A" text: "失效旧Token" - type: process lane: "A" text: "写入审计日志(重置密码)" - type: start_end text: "流程结束" - name: "⑤ 密码修改" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收修改密码请求" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "旧密码正确?" on_no: "返回密码错误" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "新旧密码相同?" on_no: "返回不能相同" yes_label: "否" no_label: "是" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "密码规则校验?" on_no: "返回密码规则提示" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "更新密码哈希" - type: process lane: "A" text: "吊销所有其他Session" - type: process lane: "A" text: "写入审计日志(改密码)" - type: start_end text: "流程结束" - name: "⑥ 退出登录" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收退出请求" - type: process lane: "A" text: "清除Session/Token" - type: start_end text: "退出完成" - type: note title: "会话失效（被动退出）" lines: - "1. 接口返回 401" - "2. 检测到 Token 失效" - "3. 清除本地 Token / Cookie" - "4. 跳转首页 + 提示 Session expired" - "触发：Token过期 / 密码修改 / 管理员强制下线" - name: "⑦ 账号注销" steps: - type: start_end text: "开始" - type: process lane: "A" text: "接收注销请求" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "身份验证通过?" on_no: "返回验证失败" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "标记status=注销" - type: process lane: "A" text: "记录deactivated_at" - type: process lane: "A" text: "吊销所有Session" - type: process lane: "A" text: "写入审计日志(注销)" - type: start_end text: "注销完成" - type: note title: "注销冷静期说明" lines: - "1. 注销后 30 天内可联系客服恢复" - "2. 超过 30 天数据永久删除" - "3. 冷静期内账号不可登录" - "身份验证：有密码→验密码，仅OAuth→重新授权" - name: "⑧ Token刷新" steps: - type: start_end text: "触发" - type: process lane: "A" text: "检测access_token过期" - type: process lane: "A" text: "携带refresh_token请求刷新" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "refresh_token有效?" on_no: "返回401" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "Session状态活跃?" on_no: "返回401(已吊销)" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "签发新access_token" - type: process lane: "A" text: "滑动续期refresh_token" - type: start_end text: "刷新完成" - name: "⑨ 协议版本检测" steps: - type: start_end text: "触发" - type: process lane: "A" text: "用户访问任意页面" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "协议版本有更新?" on_no: "正常访问" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "弹出协议更新弹窗" - type: decision lane: "A" text: "用户同意?" on_no: "强制退出登录" yes_label: "是" no_label: "否" - type: process lane: "A" text: "提交同意请求" - type: process lane: "A" text: "写入ConsentRecord" - type: process lane: "A" text: "记录协议版本+国家" - type: start_end text: "完成"
svg.text: Looply · 登录注册模块系统流程图
接收注册请求(邮箱+密码)
1. 设备指纹是否已知(未知→创建记录)
2. 是否信任设备(不信任→额外验证)
3. IP地理位置异常?(异常→异地风险)
4. 暴力破解检测(触发→拦截/封禁)
5. 综合风险: 低→放行 中→验证码 高→拦截
接收登录请求(邮箱+密码)
接收三方登录/注册请求
接收重置密码请求(邮箱)
写入审计日志(重置密码)
当前：①② 分离式注册/登录入口
预留：Identifier-First 统一入口模式
①② 后端流程段零改动，仅新增路由层
已绑定用户(老用户)路径
provider_uid已绑定 = 老用户重复OAuth登录
直接: 签发Token → 记录设备指纹+关联Session → 完成
跳过下方所有注册/绑定/Provider特殊处理步骤
4. 跳转首页 + 提示 Session expired
触发：Token过期 / 密码修改 / 管理员强制下线
1. 注销后 30 天内可联系客服恢复
2. 超过 30 天数据永久删除
3. 冷静期内账号不可登录
身份验证：有密码→验密码，仅OAuth→重新授权
